name: ai-tools-kit
description: A bilingual web app and CLI collection of practical AI tools with pluggable providers.

scripts.test: node tests/smoke.test.js && node tests/cli.test.js && node tests/api.test.js && node tests/package.test.js
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check bin/ai-tools.js && node --check src/cache.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/files.js && node --check src/providers.js && node --check src/run.js && node --check src/tools.js && node --check public/app.js

author: niuxinhuai
